# Settled State System

<!-- Generated by proofd. Rule ID: settled-state. Do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Default Prefix: SE | Prefixes: SE -->

- [SE-01] SettledStateManager: centralized per-session hysteresis for idle/actionNeeded/waitingPermission transitions. Replaces per-consumer debounce timers. actionNeeded and waitingPermission settle immediately; idle uses IDLE_HYSTERESIS_MS (2000ms) to filter transient idle→active→idle flickers. Subscribers get settle/clear callbacks. Fed by effective state (accounting for subagents) from a Zustand effect in App.tsx.
